Xeno.options.advCulling.tooltip: Use a culling algorithm that might improve performance by reducing the number of non visible chunk sections rendered.
Xeno.options.ao.subBlock.tooltip: Enables smooth lighting for non full block (experimental).
Xeno.options.entityCulling.tooltip: Enables culling for entities on not visible sections.
Xeno.options.frameQueue.tooltip: Higher values might help stabilize frametime but will increase input lag.
Xeno.options.backfaceCulling.tooltip: Culls not visible block faces on the CPU improving GPU performance. To prevent increased CPU overhead enable Indirect Draw.
Xeno.options.indirectDraw.tooltip: Reduces CPU overhead but might increase GPU overhead.
Xeno.options.uniqueOpaqueLayer.tooltip: Use a unique render layer for opaque terrain to improve performance.
Xeno.options.wayland.tooltip: Use Linux Wayland compositor if available (Experimental). Requires restart.
